detail.description:
Welcome to Fat Goose Food Street!

Sweet, sour, bitter, spicy, salty—which flavor truly captures the essence of life? Take the helm today, combine ingredients endlessly, and encounter adorable Fat Goose guests!

【Relax and Synthesize, Explore a Variety of Recipes】
This is a synthesis experience that stimulates your taste buds and relieves stress!

Explore premium ingredients through synthesis,

and cook steaming hot delicacies.
